body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This is a feature request to add support for Key Vault REST API version `2026-02-01` in the `Azure.Security.KeyVault.*` client libraries (Secrets, Keys, and Certificates). The requester notes the current latest supported API version in the SDK is `2025-07-01`, and the new `2026-02-01` version introduces an important behavioral change (new vaults default to Azure RBAC). Older API versions are planned for retirement by **2027-02-27**.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Analysis</summary>

**Type:** Feature request  
**Affected libraries:**
- `Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets`
- `Azure.Security.KeyVault.Keys`
- `Azure.Security.KeyVault.Certificates`

**Key motivation:**
- API version `2026-02-01` changes the default access control model for new Key Vault vaults (defaults to Azure RBAC instead of Vault Access Policies)
- The SDK currently exposes only up to `2025-07-01` in `*ClientOptions` service version enums
- Retirement of older API versions is planned for 2027-02-27, creating urgency

**No duplicate found** — this appears to be the first open issue specifically tracking `2026-02-01` support.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔍 Relevant Code Locations</summary>

The service version enums to update would be in:
- `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/src/SecretClientOptions.cs`
- `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Keys/src/KeyClientOptions.cs`
- `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Certificates/src/CertificateClientOptions.cs`

Each of these files contains a `ServiceVersion` enum where the new `V2026_02_01` entry (and corresponding default) would need to be added, along with any new API surface exposed by the new version.
</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Suggested Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Confirm that the Key Vault REST API `2026-02-01` spec is published and stable (check [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/keyvault))
- [ ] Update `ServiceVersion` enum in `SecretClientOptions`, `KeyClientOptions`, and `CertificateClientOptions` to add `V2026_02_01`
- [ ] Update the default service version to `2026-02-01` (or decide on policy — may want to keep old default for back-compat)
- [ ] Regenerate code if the libraries use code generation from the OpenAPI/TypeSpec spec
- [ ] Update CHANGELOG.md for each affected library
- [ ] Add or update tests for new API version behavior (particularly RBAC default)
- [ ] Review whether any new properties/operations are introduced in `2026-02-01` that need SDK surface
- [ ] Assess whether a new package version (minor bump) is needed
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Helpful References</summary>

- [MS Learn: Prepare for Key Vault API versions 2026-02-01 and later](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/key-vault/general/access-control-default?tabs=azure-cli)
- [Key Vault REST API specs (azure-rest-api-specs)](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/keyvault/data-plane)
- [SDK contributing guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Azure SDK for .NET – keyvault SDK folder](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/keyvault)
</details>
